name: Paterson Resources Ltd.
summary: Paterson Resources Ltd., a junior mineral resources company, focuses on the exploration and development of gold and copper projects. The company holds interests in the Grace gold project located in the Paterson mineral province in Western Australia; the Pilbara Gold projects comprises four exploration licences; the Horseshoe South project located in Western Australia; and the Burraga copper-gold project located in the province of the East Lachlan Fold Belt in central western New South Wales. The company was formerly known as Hardey Resources Limited and changed its name to Paterson Resources Ltd. in December 2019. Paterson Resources Ltd. was incorporated in 2005 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
